title: agent-fleet agent.yaml
description: Per-agent configuration — runtime, egress references, and environment

egress.description: Ordered list of egress preset names (defined in fleet.yaml). First match wins across presets.

runtime.description: Runtime provider — what process runs in this agent's container

env.description: Non-secret environment variables injected into the agent container

provider-ref.description: A provider reference with optional options

options.description: Provider-specific options. Validated by the provider's own schema.json.
